tasks.title: Create directory lib/Service/Serializer/
tasks.description: Create directory `lib/Service/Serializer/` (PHP namespace `OCA\OpenRegister\Service\Serializer`).

tasks.title: Create RegisterSerializer.php with constructor DI
tasks.description: Create `lib/Service/Serializer/RegisterSerializer.php` with constructor DI for `SchemaMapper` and `LoggerInterface`.

tasks.title: Implement RegisterSerializer::serialize()
tasks.description: Implement `RegisterSerializer::serialize(Register $register, array $extend = [], ?array $schemaStats = null): array` — calls `$register->jsonSerialize()`, then applies `$extend` transformations.

tasks.title: Implement RegisterSerializer::serializeMany()
tasks.description: Implement `RegisterSerializer::serializeMany(array $registers, array $extend = [], ?array $schemaStatsByRegisterId = null): array` — iterates and delegates to `serialize()`.

tasks.title: Implement 'schemas' extension with orphan-ID retention
tasks.description: For each ID in the register's `schemas` field, attempt `SchemaMapper::find($id, _multitenancy: false)`. On success, place the schema's `jsonSerialize()` output in the same array position. On `DoesNotExistException`, retain the original ID in its position (do NOT drop it) and log a warning via `LoggerInterface` with the failed ID in context.

tasks.title: Implement '@self.stats' extension
tasks.description: Only effective when `'schemas'` is also in `$extend`. For each successfully expanded schema object, set `stats.objects.total` from the provided `$schemaStats` lookup; default to `0` when the ID is absent from the lookup. Orphan ID entries are NOT augmented.

tasks.title: Unknown _extend keys are silently ignored
tasks.description: Unknown `_extend` keys are silently ignored (no exception, no log).

tasks.title: Preserve properties on expanded schemas
tasks.description: Do NOT strip the `properties` field from expanded schemas (the serializer preserves it; stripping is a consumer concern).

tasks.title: Inject RegisterSerializer into RegisterService
tasks.description: Add `RegisterSerializer` as a constructor dependency on `RegisterService`.

tasks.title: Add RegisterService::findSerialized()
tasks.description: Add `RegisterService::findSerialized(string|int $id, array $_extend = [], bool $_multitenancy = true): array` — calls existing `find()`, pre-computes stats if `'@self.stats'` AND `'schemas'` are requested (via existing `getSchemaObjectCounts()`), delegates to `RegisterSerializer::serialize()`.

tasks.title: Add RegisterService::findAllSerialized()
tasks.description: Add `RegisterService::findAllSerialized(?int $limit = null, ?int $offset = null, ?array $filters = [], ?array $searchConditions = [], ?array $searchParams = [], array $_extend = [], bool $_multitenancy = true): array` — calls existing `findAll()`, pre-computes per-register schema stats if requested, delegates to `RegisterSerializer::serializeMany()`.

tasks.title: Keep findAll/find signatures unchanged
tasks.description: Keep `RegisterService::findAll()` and `::find()` signatures and return types unchanged (still return `Register[]` / `Register`). The `_extend` parameter on these methods is documented as a no-op placeholder for signature compatibility.

tasks.title: Replace inline schema-expansion in RegistersController::index()
tasks.description: Replace the inline schema-expansion block (`lib/Controller/RegistersController.php:286-345`) with a single call to `$this->registerService->findAllSerialized(...)`, passing the parsed `$_extend` array.

tasks.title: Remove direct SchemaMapper usage from index()
tasks.description: Remove the direct `SchemaMapper` usage for expansion within `index()` (keep any other usages intact).

tasks.title: Remove inline getSchemaObjectCounts() from index()
tasks.description: Remove the inline `getSchemaObjectCounts()` call and per-schema stats loop from `index()` — the serializer now owns this.

tasks.title: Verify RegistersController::index() is thin (ADR-008)
tasks.description: Verify `RegistersController::index()` body is thin (routing, param parsing, service call, response formatting only) per ADR-008.

tasks.title: Drop _extend from RegisterMapper::findAll()
tasks.description: Drop `_extend` from `RegisterMapper::findAll()` signature and remove the `@SuppressWarnings(PHPMD.UnusedFormalParameter)` pragma on that method.

tasks.title: Drop _extend from RegisterMapper::find()
tasks.description: Drop `_extend` from `RegisterMapper::find()` signature and remove the `@SuppressWarnings` pragma on that method.

tasks.title: Stop forwarding _extend to the mapper
tasks.description: Update `RegisterService::findAll()` and `::find()` to stop forwarding `_extend` to the mapper (the mapper no longer accepts it).

tasks.title: composer check:strict passes
tasks.description: Run `composer check:strict` — PHPCS / PHPMD / Psalm / PHPStan must pass, including any new sniff complaints arising from the signature change.

tasks.title: Unit test: no _extend keeps schemas as IDs
tasks.description: No `_extend` passed → output `schemas` is the ID array from `Register::jsonSerialize()`, unchanged. No `SchemaMapper::find()` calls made.

tasks.title: Unit test: _extend=['schemas'] expands all resolvable schemas
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas']` with all schemas resolvable → output `schemas` is an array of schema objects in original order; each object contains `id`, `title`, and `properties`.

tasks.title: Unit test: orphan ID retained in original position
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas']` with one orphan ID → output contains the orphan ID in its original array position (mixed object/ID array); logger receives a warning with the failing ID in context; no exception thrown.

tasks.title: Unit test: orphan IDs preserve original type (int vs string)
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas']` with mixed numeric and UUID schema references where both orphans → each orphan retains its original type (int stays int; string stays string).

tasks.title: Unit test: stats attached when schemas + @self.stats
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas', '@self.stats']` with precomputed stats `[10 => 5, 20 => 0]` → schema 10 has `stats.objects.total == 5`; schema 20 has `stats.objects.total == 0`.

tasks.title: Unit test: orphans not augmented with stats
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas', '@self.stats']` where one schema ID is orphan → expanded schemas have stats; orphan ID is a bare int/string with no wrapping.

tasks.title: Unit test: @self.stats alone is a no-op
tasks.description: `_extend: ['@self.stats']` alone (no `'schemas'`) → `schemas` field is unchanged ID array; no stats anywhere.

tasks.title: Unit test: unknown _extend keys silently ignored
tasks.description: `_extend: ['schemas', 'unknown-key']` → output identical to `_extend: ['schemas']`; no warnings emitted for the unknown key.

tasks.title: Unit test: Register::jsonSerialize() still ID-only
tasks.description: `Register::jsonSerialize()` after all changes → `schemas` field is still an ID array (entity contract unchanged).

tasks.title: Integration test: GET /api/registers?_extend=schemas snapshot parity
tasks.description: Add an integration test that hits `GET /api/registers?_extend=schemas` and compares the response to a snapshot captured before the refactor — must be byte-identical for the happy path (no orphan IDs in test fixtures).

tasks.title: Integration test: orphan-schema fixture preserves ID
tasks.description: Add an integration test that hits `GET /api/registers?_extend=schemas` with a fixture containing a register referencing a deleted schema — verifies the orphan ID is preserved in the response (post-refactor behavior change).

tasks.title: Integration test: schemas + @self.stats
tasks.description: Add an integration test for `GET /api/registers?_extend=schemas&_extend=@self.stats` → each expanded schema has `stats.objects.total`.

tasks.title: Integration test: HTTP and DI parity
tasks.description: Add a service-level integration test that calls `$registerService->findAllSerialized(_extend: ['schemas'])` via DI and asserts identical output to the HTTP path (same fixture, ignoring HTTP envelope).

tasks.title: Grep opencatalogi/softwarecatalog for RegisterService _extend callers
tasks.description: Grep `opencatalogi/` and `softwarecatalog/` for `RegisterService::findAll(` and `RegisterService::find(` with `_extend` — note any consumers that may benefit from the new `findAllSerialized` / `findSerialized` methods. Do NOT change them in this PR; file follow-up issues if any are found.

tasks.title: Document DocuDesk follow-up for RegisterDiscoveryService
tasks.description: Grep `docudesk/lib/Service/RegisterDiscoveryService.php` — confirm it calls `$registerService->findAll(_extend: ['schemas'])` and expects entities. Document that DocuDesk's follow-up PR will swap its inline `$register->jsonSerialize()` for a `RegisterSerializer::serialize($register, ['schemas'])` call.

tasks.title: Verify DocuDesk dropdown still empty (no fix-through-magic)
tasks.description: Manually verify (in a local dev environment) that DocuDesk's admin settings schema dropdown remains empty on the current OpenRegister build after this change — confirming no accidental fix-through-magic. The DocuDesk dropdown populates only after DocuDesk's own follow-up PR.

tasks.title: Document Serializer namespace and RegisterSerializer usage
tasks.description: Update `openregister/docs/` or relevant section to document the `lib/Service/Serializer/` namespace and `RegisterSerializer` usage (example call for a DI consumer).

tasks.title: CHANGELOG entry for findSerialized/findAllSerialized + orphan retention
tasks.description: Add a CHANGELOG entry noting: (a) new `findAllSerialized` / `findSerialized` on `RegisterService`, (b) new `RegisterSerializer`, (c) the orphan-schema-ID retention behavior change for `/api/registers?_extend=schemas`.

tasks.title: Open DocuDesk follow-up ticket
tasks.description: Update or create the follow-up ticket in DocuDesk (internal tracker / GitHub issue) referencing this change and describing the one-line swap needed in `RegisterDiscoveryService::serializeRegister()`.

tasks.title: composer check:strict passes
tasks.description: `composer check:strict` passes (PHPCS, PHPMD, Psalm, PHPStan).

tasks.title: Existing test suite passes
tasks.description: Existing test suite passes (`composer test` or equivalent).

tasks.title: New unit and integration tests pass
tasks.description: New unit and integration tests from sections 5 and 6 pass.

tasks.title: Psalm/PHPStan zero new issues on changed files
tasks.description: Psalm/PHPStan show zero new issues on the changed files.

tasks.title: Code review confirms ADR-008 alignment
tasks.description: Code review: confirm ADR-008 alignment (controller is thin; business logic in service/serializer).
